_meta.method: Searched practice_intel.red_flags and practice_intel.overall_assessment for IL GP watched locations (state=IL, entity_classification NOT IN specialist/non_clinical/da_unverified/duplicate_location, joined to watched_zips). Strong patterns include third-party confirmation (Yelp/Google/BBB/Birdeye "permanently closed", "out of business", "confirmed closed"). Medium patterns include retirement, relocation, inability to verify existence, very stale data. Weak patterns flag possible closure language. Zero-contact pool is phone IS NULL/empty AND website IS NULL/empty. False positive exclusions prevent matching "not accepting new patients", "closed on weekends", "temporarily closed", "closed during COVID", "office hours", "by appointment only", and similar non-closure references.
false_positive_patterns_excluded: accepting new patients / now accepting / new patients welcome
_meta.db_writes: ZERO — read-only analysis, no UPDATE/INSERT/DELETE executed
